extract: Seafolk Village (Japanese: 海の民の村 Seafolk Village) is a location on Poni Island of the Alola region. It connects to the Poni Wilds in the north and also provides access to Exeggutor Island once the player has visited the Ruins of Hope. Mina's houseboat is located here, acting as the primary location of her trial in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. It is the only settlement on the island.
